text:
Library of 
Medicine’s RxNorm Concept Unique Identifiers (RXCUIs). 

This field is a key that links of Part D sponsor's formulary file to their contract and plan identifiers. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 8-digit numeric value 

COMMENT: The same formulary may be used by more than one plan benefit package (PBP; variable called 
PLAN_ID) within a contract. 

The CCW constructs a Formulary characteristics file from the CMS Approved Formulary Data found in 
the
